reason: New IPC for fs:write-file, ssh terminal spawn, host registry, session routing — follow existing IPC patterns
Avoid IPC handler registration pitfalls when adding remote/host IPC channels
Env injection rules — LLM env (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL) injected for borrow-mode, SKIPPED for remote-native sessions
remote-server.ts endpoint conventions — desktop client reuses the mobile server protocol (Tier 2)
Tailscale/SSH transport + tunnel/network behavior for Tier 2 connection
node-pty cross-arch packaging for the headless remote backend bundle (Tier 2 bootstrap)
Native dep packaging caveats for the single-file remote backend binary
Multi-window (per-host window binding) + CSP constraints in the renderer
Build/packaging setup when producing the headless backend artifact
